cases.success_signal: correct implementation with comparable baseline evidence

cases.risk: causal or padding mask semantic error
cases.success_signal: counterexample found or boundary matrix passes
non-divisible shapes are tested against an independent oracle

cases.risk: rank visibility or state lifetime error
cases.success_signal: global-to-rank equivalence and communication ordering are validated
gradient oracle and accumulation edge cases pass

cases.risk: rounding, saturation, NaN, or accumulator mismatch
cases.success_signal: dtype policy and adversarial values are covered

cases.risk: candidate and reference share the same semantic error
cases.success_signal: optimization stops and an independent/metamorphic oracle is introduced
performance claim is rejected by executable guardrail

cases.risk: agent edits without reading the authoritative remote contract
cases.success_signal: repository edit stops and the missing contract is reported

cases.risk: IR upload declared ready with missing HLO or error log
cosine metric rejects identical all-zero outputs
cases.success_signal: identical zero tensors pass while one-sided zero fails

cases.risk: process success is mistaken for a visible usable profile
cases.success_signal: profile remains partial until xplane and UI run visibility pass
